posts.text: The Great Six Month Financial Blindfold https://www.zerohedge.com/markets/great-six-month-financial-blindfold
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: The tokenized equity market is seeing unprecedented growth. There are now over 670,000 people holding tokenized equities onchain. This figure has surged +73% month-over-month and +449% year-to-date. Amid this growth, Solana now accounts for 85% of onchain tokenized equities volume. Furthermore, Jupiter's routed tokenized asset volume is up 300% year-to-date, driven by the recent increase in demand for trading outside of market hours. Over the last 30 days, ~68% of the onchain platform's volume was traded during weekends and off-hours. The market is quickly shifting to 24/7 price action.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
